Design system  /  Components  /  Redoc shell
RedocShell + VerbPill · 3-column API-reference layout (left nav / middle prose / right code samples)
OpenRegister API
v3 · OpenAPI 3.1
Objects
Get List objects Get Get object Post Create object Patch Update object Del Delete object
Schemas
Get List schemas Post Register schema
Files
Get List files for object Post Attach file

List objects

Returns a paginated list of objects for the given register + schema combination. Supports faceting on indexed properties.

Get /api/objects/{register}/{schema}

Path parameters

NameTypeDescription
registerstringThe register slug (e.g. woo).
schemastringThe schema slug within the register (e.g. publication).

Query parameters

NameTypeDescription
pageintegerPage number, starting at 1.
page_sizeintegerPage size, max 200.
qstringFull-text query against indexed fields.

Responses

StatusBody
200Paginated list of objects.
404Register or schema not found.
cURL Node PHP 
# list publications, first page
curl "https://nextcloud.example/index.php/apps/openregister/api/objects/woo/publication?page=1&page_size=20" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H "Accept: application/json"
React / MDX usage

Mount in MDX as <RedocShell/>

Three-column API-reference layout that wraps Redocusaurus output and gives it the Conduction-brand chrome. Left rail is a sticky endpoint nav with HTTP-verb pills, middle column is the operation prose + parameter tables, right rail is the dark code-sample box with cURL / Node / PHP tabs.

On a real consumer site this component is the host shell into which Redocusaurus mounts; for the kit specimen above, the content is hand-authored to show the layout. The <VerbPill/> primitive is exported separately so apps can reuse the verb tag outside the shell.

Verb colours

  • GET — light blue (read, safe)
  • POST — mint (create, idempotent-safe)
  • PATCH / PUT — orange (mutate)
  • DELETE — vermillion (destructive)

Import & example

import {RedocShell, VerbPill} from '@conduction/docusaurus-preset/components';

<RedocShell
  apiTitle="OpenRegister API"
  apiVersion="v3 · OpenAPI 3.1"
  spec="/openapi.json"          // Redocusaurus passes this through
  collapsed={false}
/>

// or use VerbPill standalone:
<VerbPill verb="get"/> <code>/api/objects/{register}/{schema}</code>

Props

  • apiTitle shown at the top of the left rail (e.g. OpenRegister API)
  • apiVersion mono-uppercase caption under the title
  • spec URL or imported JSON for the OpenAPI document (passed through to Redocusaurus)
  • collapsed bool — collapse the left rail on first paint (default false)

VerbPill takes verb (get / post / patch / put / delete). The delete verb uses the .del CSS class internally so the selector stays away from the JS-reserved keyword.
